title: 雨夜里 一个女孩站在城市
story: 雨夜里，一个女孩站在城市街头，最后转身离开。

01.imagePrompt: Lin stands alone under a flickering sign. rainy neon street at night. Static keyframe, no exaggerated motion. young woman, sharp bob haircut, pale skin, restrained expression. dark long coat, understated boots, minimal accessories. cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast. blue neon, red accents, silver reflections, wet asphalt glow. Maintain consistent face, hair, costume, and lighting across all shots. Aspect ratio 9:16.
01.motionPrompt: The subject keeps still for a moment and breathes slowly. Camera slow push-in. Environment Keep the same rainy city street, same neon palette, and restrained background movement throughout. Style cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast.
